name: agent-sec-core-qwen-code-extension
description: ANOLISA security integration for Qwen Code

hooks.name: agent-sec-prompt-scanner
hooks.description: Scan the Qwen Code user prompt for injection attacks

hooks.name: agent-sec-observability
hooks.description: Record the Qwen Code user prompt event

hooks.name: agent-sec-pii-checker
hooks.description: Scan Qwen Code user prompts for PII and credentials

hooks.name: agent-sec-observability
hooks.description: Record the Qwen Code pre-tool event

hooks.name: agent-sec-pii-checker
hooks.description: Scan Qwen Code tool inputs for PII and credentials

hooks.name: agent-sec-observability
hooks.description: Record the Qwen Code successful tool event

hooks.name: agent-sec-pii-checker
hooks.description: Scan Qwen Code tool outputs for PII and credentials

hooks.name: agent-sec-observability
hooks.description: Record the Qwen Code failed tool event

hooks.name: agent-sec-pii-checker
hooks.description: Scan Qwen Code tool failures for PII and credentials

hooks.name: agent-sec-observability
hooks.description: Record the Qwen Code completed agent run

hooks.name: agent-sec-pii-checker
hooks.description: Scan Qwen Code model output for PII and credentials

hooks.name: agent-sec-observability
hooks.description: Record the Qwen Code failed agent run

hooks.name: agent-sec-pii-checker
hooks.description: Audit partial Qwen Code model output for PII and credentials
